character_name: all the young ladies in the neighbourhood

quotes.quote_text: “ Good Heaven ! What is to become of us ? What are we to do ? ”

context.quote_text: “ No ; it would have been strange if they had . But I make no doubt they often talk of it between themselves . Well , if they can be easy with an estate that is not lawfully their own , so much the better . _ I _ should be ashamed of having one that was only entailed on me . ”
“ When Colonel Miller ’s regiment went away ”
“ How can you be smiling so , Lizzy ? ”

quotes.quote_text: “ How can you be smiling so , Lizzy ? ”

context.quote_text: “ When Colonel Miller ’s regiment went away ”
“ Good Heaven ! What is to become of us ? What are we to do ? ”
“ I cried for two days together when Colonel Miller ’s regiment went away . I thought I should have broke my heart . ”
